The '''''Satellite Liberator''''' was a [[Bendine/Legends|Bendine]] [[XR12/Legends|XR12]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] in operation at some point prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. It was slightly smaller than an average [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]].

The capsule-shaped ''Satellite Liberator'' was junked, finding its way into the backyard of the [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] [[Wald's Parts|junk shop]] owned by the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Watto/Legends|Watto]].
